funding_ask: Raising $1.5M Seed to complete V10 development and launch with enterprise compliance features.

slides.title: Title
slides.action_title: ProductOS gives Product Managers god-like superpowers — automating 80% of their manual workflow with world-class AI
slides.key_message: ProductOS is an AI-powered PM operating system that autonomously generates McKinsey-quality strategy, IDEO-quality prototypes, and April Dunford-quality positioning from messy research inputs.
supporting_data: 85% of PMs spend >10hrs/week on manual tasks

slides.title: Problem
slides.action_title: PMs spend 60% of their week on manual compilation, not strategic thinking
slides.key_message: The typical PM spends 15hrs/week on competitive research, documentation, status updates, and strategy deck creation. This is work that AI can do at 90%+ quality parity — freeing PMs for the work AI cannot do: judgment, taste, stakeholder influence.
supporting_data: 40% rewrite rate on existing AI PM tool outputs
0 AI PM tools offer PESTLE, decision intelligence, or autonomous prototypes
slides.source: PM survey 2026, Competitive feature matrix Q2 2026

slides.title: Solution
slides.action_title: ProductOS V10 autonomously generates the full PM lifecycle — strategy, discovery, prototypes, execution, and content
slides.key_message: Drop messy research inputs. ProductOS generates: McKinsey-quality PESTLE analysis, evidence-backed personas with empathy maps, end-to-end customer journeys with emotion curves, 3 interactive HTML prototypes with WCAG accessibility, developer-ready PRDs and stories, and complete marketing content packs.

slides.title: Why Now
slides.action_title: Three tailwinds converge in 2026: LLM capability maturity, PM AI literacy demand, and regulatory moat
slides.key_message: 1) LLM agents now reliable enough for production PM workflows 2) 85% of PMs actively seeking AI tooling for career advancement 3) EU AI Act creates compliance barrier — first-mover advantage for compliant AI PM tools
supporting_data: EU AI Act August 2026 compliance deadline
slides.source: PESTLE analysis 2026, PM survey 2026, EU AI Act

slides.title: Market
slides.action_title: .8B PM tooling market growing 35% CAGR — AI-native tools capturing 2x the growth
slides.key_message: TAM: .8B (2026) → .5B (2028). SAM: .2B enterprise PM segment. SOM: M target (0.5% penetration of SAM). AI-native PM tools growing at 70% vs 35% for the category.

slides.title: Product
slides.action_title: ProductOS V10: autonomous PM operating system with 3 layers — Intelligence, Decisions, Production
slides.key_message: Intelligence Layer: competitive radar, weak signal detection, PESTLE auto-refresh. Decision Layer: trade-off analysis, decision trees, premortems, pricing intelligence. Production Layer: AI prototypes, PRDs, stories, marketing content. All connected through a living system and Product Health Dashboard.

slides.title: Traction
slides.action_title: V10 beta: 10 PMs reporting 70% time savings and 85% output quality parity
slides.key_message: 10 PM beta testers. 8/10 would recommend. Average 10+ hrs/week time savings. Output quality: 85% parity with manual PM work. Key finding: competitive intelligence automation is most underrated capability.

slides.title: Competition
slides.action_title: ProductOS offers 10+ capabilities no competitor offers — each validated by gold-standard external frameworks
slides.key_message: Competitive feature matrix analysis across 3 competitors shows ProductOS leading on 10/16 capabilities. Unique capabilities include: PESTLE analysis, decision intelligence, AI prototype generation, autonomous review gates, and living system auto-refresh.
supporting_data: 2/16 where competitors lead (PRD generation, enterprise SSO)

slides.title: Business Model
slides.action_title: Hybrid subscription + usage model: -149/seat with /bin/zsh.10/agent run — 55x ROI for PM teams
slides.key_message: Professional: /seat/month (full discovery + autonomous). Enterprise: /seat/month (SSO + audit + dedicated support). Usage: /bin/zsh.10/agent run for autonomous workflows. Unit economics: LTV/CAC 8:1 enterprise, 6:1 startup.

slides.title: Team
slides.action_title: 4 engineers + 1 PM with deep AI agent and PM workflow expertise
slides.key_message: Team background: AI agent tooling, enterprise PM workflows, developer tools. Previously built PM tooling at [company].
supporting_data: AI agent and PM domain expertise

slides.title: Financials
slides.action_title: Path to M ARR in 3 years with .5M Seed
slides.key_message: Year 1: K ARR (50 enterprise accounts + 200 startup). Year 2: M ARR. Year 3: M ARR. Gross margin: 85%. Burn: K/month.

slides.title: Ask
slides.action_title: Raising .5M Seed to complete V10 and launch with enterprise compliance
slides.key_message: .5M on SAFE. 18-month runway. Use: 60% engineering, 20% GTM, 10% infra, 10% compliance. Milestone: K ARR within 12 months.

narrative_flow: The narrative arcs from the PM's pain (too much manual work) → the market opportunity (PMs willing to pay for AI leverage) → ProductOS as the only complete solution → defensibility through regulatory moat and unique capabilities → team capable of executing → financials showing path to $5M ARR.
